body:
🔥 Melee Weapon: Deals extremely high damage in close combat.

🗡️ Ranged Weapon: Shoots unlimited arrows like a bow.

⚡ Throws weapons like a trident – ​​and returns to hand.

🧠 Instantly teleports to the direction of view with Shift + Right Click.

🪓 Digging up letters, chopping down trees super fast: No need for pickaxe, scraps or fire.

♾️ No time limit, no usage limit.
